channel.title: Fairness on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Fairness on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Recommendation Systems (13): Fairness, Debiasing, and Explainability
item.description: A user opens Spotify and the same fifty songs keep appearing. They open Amazon and the top results are always the items they have already considered. They open YouTube and every recommendation is one click away from a rabbit hole they cannot remember asking for. Each of these symptoms has a name, a cause, and a fix. This article is about all three.
